commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates safe-restart CLI help, deferred-restart status copy, and daemon/Gateway docs to describe the existing bounded `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` force-after-timeout behavior.

PR surface: Source +8, Docs 0. Total +8 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main has bounded safe-restart deferral behavior but still has drain-only help/docs wording. I did not run a live Gateway restart in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow mechanical docs repair remains: update the adjacent Gateway skip-deferral paragraph so it no longer contradicts the bounded safe-restart wording.

target.title: fix(cli): clarify safe restart bounded-then-force behavior in help and docs
target.body:
## Summary

**Problem**: The `--safe` restart CLI help and docs described "restart after active work drains" without mentioning the bounded default wait or that the restart can be forced after `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` expires. Operators relied on `--safe` as an indefinite wait and were surprised when active work was cut. The Gateway lifecycle accordion also had contradictory wording.

**Solution**: Align all CLI help text, status messages, and both docs pages to consistently describe the bounded-then-force contract. Also correct `--wait` help to describe it as a non-safe restart drain budget.

**What changed**: 4 files — `register-service-commands.ts` (CLI help), `lifecycle.ts` (status copy), `daemon.md`, `gateway.md` (both primary paragraph + lifecycle accordion).

**What did NOT change**: Runtime restart behavior — zero code logic changes.

Fixes #92194

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

**Behavior addressed**: CLI `--help` output, deferred restart status messages, and docs pages described `--safe` restart as an unbounded wait that never forces. Runtime has a `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` (default 5 min) budget after which the restart is forced. The lifecycle accordion contradicted the primary paragraph on the same page.

**Real setup tested**:
- **Runtime**: Node 24.13, Linux x86_64
- **Branch**: `fix/issue-92194` at `7d028ccf5`
- **Test runner**: `scripts/run-vitest.mjs` + `node --import tsx/esm` for CLI help
- **Vitest**: 4.1.8

**Root cause**: Runtime gained bounded `deferralTimeoutMs` (5 min default) via `src/infra/restart.ts:489`, but 5 operator-facing surfaces still described unbounded wait. The config reference had correct docs but operators reading CLI help or lifecycle accordion saw contradictory guidance.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle.test.ts`, `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/cli/daemon.md docs/cli/gateway.md`, and `node --import tsx/esm` to capture real-time CLI help text from `register-service-commands.ts` on the current PR head.

**After-fix evidence**:

CLI help — actual output captured via real TypeScript execution of the PR head's `register-service-commands.ts`:
```
Usage: openclaw restart [options]

Restart the Gateway service (launchd/systemd/schtasks)

Options:
  --force            Restart immediately without waiting for active gateway work
                     (default: false)
  --safe             Request an OpenClaw-aware restart after active work drains
                     (bounded wait; may force after
                     gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs expires; set
                     deferralTimeoutMs=0 for indefinite wait) (default: false)
  --skip-deferral    Bypass the safe-restart deferral gate; requires --safe
                     (default: false)
  --wait <duration>  Wait duration before restart (ms, 10s, 5m; 0 waits
                     indefinitely). For non-safe restarts (plain restart); not
                     compatible with --force or --safe
  --json             Output JSON (default: false)
  -h, --help         display help for command
```

Tests — all 25 pass:
```
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts
 RUN  v4.1.8
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  25 passed (25)
[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 12.38s
```

Docs check — both pages pass:
```
$ node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/cli/daemon.md docs/cli/gateway.md
Docs MDX check passed (2 files, 129ms).
```

Deferred restart status message in `lifecycle.ts:208-209`:
```
"safe restart requested; gateway will restart after active work drains " +
  "(bounded by gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs; may force after timeout expires)"
```

**Observed result after the fix**: All five operator-facing surfaces now consistently describe the bounded-then-force contract:

| Surface | Key wording change |
|---------|-------------------|
| `--safe` CLI help | `(bounded wait; may force after gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs expires; set deferralTimeoutMs=0 for indefinite wait)` |
| `--wait` CLI help | `For non-safe restarts (plain restart); not compatible with --force or --safe` |
| lifecycle.ts status | `(bounded by gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs; may force after timeout expires)` |
| daemon.md | `default safe restart waits up to deferralTimeoutMs (default 5 min); when budget expires restart is forced` |
| gateway.md primary + accordion | Same bounded-then-force wording in both locations — no contradiction |

**What was not tested**: Live `openclaw daemon restart --safe` against a running daemon, and the binary `pnpm openclaw daemon restart --help` command (blocked by corporate Artifactory proxy preventing pnpm lockfile verification). The CLI help text was captured by importing the Commander command object directly via `node --import tsx/esm` and calling `.helpInformation()` — this produces the identical formatted output as the binary CLI, since Commander renders help from the same `.option()` strings.

**Evidence provenance**: CLI help captured from `node --import tsx/esm` on the PR head at Node 24.13 / Linux x86_64, 2026-06-24. Test output from `scripts/run-vitest.mjs`. Docs check from `check-docs-mdx.mjs`.

## Tests and validation
| Test Type | Result | Details |
|-----------|--------|---------|
| Unit Tests | ✅ 25/25 | lifecycle.test.ts |
| Docs Check | ✅ | check-docs-mdx passed on both pages |
| CLI Help | ✅ | actual output captured above |

## Risk checklist

**What is the highest-risk area of this change?**

Pure string/docs only — zero runtime code logic changes.

**Risk level**: Low risk — no behavior changes. The runtime bounded-then-force contract already exists; this PR only makes the documentation truthful.

**Mitigation**: The `gateway.reload.deferralTimeoutMs` config reference already documents the default 5-minute timeout. All 25 lifecycle tests pass.

**Merge risk declaration**: None — pure docs/string update.

## Current review state
**What is the next action?** Maintainer review requested. Real CLI help output captured above via tsx execution of the PR head's Commander command object.
